ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Strict adherence to protocol, but could be more engaging in tone.<TAB>The response is relevant and consistent with the persona of a strict guardian.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Overall good quality; however, it lacks specificity to Habitat Sector C's unique context.<TAB>The response maintains persona consistency but could be more situationally aware.
